title: Kryeit: Enhanced
description: An optimized version of Kryeit modpack, with QoL mods alongside
body:
![Kryeit's banner](https://kryeit.com/images/banner.png)

Welcome to the official page for the Kryeit: Enhanced modpack.

This pack focuses on bringing many QoL features and also adding optimization mods.
It will keep a balance on mods, since it's meant to be a plug-and-play for any user wanting a more custom client.

This modpack works for both Kryeit and Kryeitive

What's Kryeit
- A Create mod survival
- A great community
- PvE, focused on performance
- More stuff (land claiming, nerfed teleport, mission system)
